title: May 14, 2026
sentiment: Anonymity is a performance, and every performance leaves fingerprints on the air.

stories.title: Mullvad exit IPs are surprisingly identifying
stories.summary: Even a privacy-focused VPN with deterministic IP allocation can't fully hide you — your exit node itself becomes a signal.

stories.title: A few words on DS4
stories.summary: Antirez built a local-first AI integration tool in a week, driven by the same hunger that built Redis — and reminded the internet that expertise compounds.
